title: Player weekly projection splits
description: Per-player 18-week split of the season projection (weekly_split_v1: even split, Elo matchup tilt, home/away, renormalized to the season total). Player order mirrors player_projections.json. Produced by scripts/build_weekly.py, validated by scripts/validate_data.py.

updated_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last regeneration.

tilt_coef.description: Elo matchup-tilt coefficient — the transparent prior the P2 optimizer refits in-season.

estimate.description: true => NOT a validated measurement (honesty flag).

injury_shape.description: Present ONLY when at least one player's split was shaped by data/injuries.json (Out 0.55 / Doubtful 0.7 / Questionable 0.9 on the first 3 non-bye weeks, season total unchanged). statuses_used = players shaped.

gsis_id.description: Same key and order as player_projections.json.

receptions_prior.description: Prior-season receptions (ESPN raw statId 53); exact PPR<->Half<->Standard conversion. 0.0 when unknown.

weeks.description: Always 18 rows, weeks 1..18. Non-bye pts sum to the season projection (within rounding).

opp.description: Canonical opponent abbreviation; null on bye.

pts.description: ESTIMATE weekly PPR points, 2dp. 0.0 on bye.
